semantic.role: Database runtime error mapping utility in the infrastructure layer.
responsibilities: Maps unknown runtime database errors to standardized ArchSpineError instances.
Detects read-only database conditions via error message pattern matching.
Assigns appropriate error codes based on failure stage (open/init) and error characteristics.
invariants: Pure function with no side effects.
Relies on core error definitions and codes.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, low-level error normalization facade for database runtime failures, insulating callers from driver-specific error details.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Generic commit (iZoy 's great commit) with no specific intent discernible from code evidence.

English.role: Database runtime error mapping utility in the infrastructure layer.
responsibilities: Maps unknown runtime database errors to standardized ArchSpineError instances.
Detects read-only database conditions via error message pattern matching.
Assigns appropriate error codes based on failure stage (open/init) and error characteristics.

exports.name: mapRuntimeDbError
exports.signature:
mapRuntimeDbError(
  error: unknown,
  stage: 'open' | 'init',
  dbPath: string,
)
